nasb.text: He did right in the sight of the Lord, and walked in the ways of his father David and did not turn aside to the right or to the left.

esv.text: And he did what was right in the eyes of the Lord, and walked in the ways of David his father; and he did not turn aside to the right hand or to the left.

cnv.text: 他行耶和華看為正的事，效法他先祖大衛所行的，不偏左，也不偏右。

ccb.text: 他做耶和华视为正的事，效法他祖先大卫，不偏不离。
